data.name: Cybersecurity Analyst (Intern)
data.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
content: Worked with the security team on monitoring, vulnerability analysis, and operational hardening across enterprise systems.
Reviewed network activity, identified weak points, and contributed to remediation efforts with practical security controls.
Strengthened my understanding of how security operations support business-critical infrastructure at scale.

data.name: Penetration Tester (Intern)
data.title: Penetration Tester
content: Supported security testing activities focused on web applications and common attack surfaces.
Participated in vulnerability assessment workflows, reporting, and practical validation of findings.
Built a stronger offensive-security mindset while learning how to communicate technical risk clearly.

data.name: DevOps/Security Intern
data.title: DevOps & Security Intern
content: Worked on infrastructure and automation in a payment-focused environment where reliability and security were both critical.
Supported administration, tooling, and operational improvements to make deployment and maintenance more consistent.
This internship strengthened my practical DevOps skills and deepened my understanding of infrastructure in production settings.

data.name: BMCE OPV Intern
data.title: BMCE OPV Platform Intern
content: Worked on a web and mobile platform supporting purchase operations and OPV workflows.
Contributed to authentication, role-based access, and audit-oriented flows, while helping improve the overall platform experience.
Combined product delivery with technical execution in a project where reliability and access control mattered.
